title: Golden Globes 2026 Winners List
text: Golden Globes 2026 Winners Summary. Top Film Winners: Best Drama: Hamnet (Focus Features). Best Comedy/Musical: One Battle After Another (Warner Bros) - won 4 awards total. Best Director: Paul Thomas Anderson for One Battle After Another. Best Screenplay: Paul Thomas Anderson for One Battle After Another. Acting Awards (Film): Drama Actor: Wagner Moura (The Secret Agent). Drama Actress: Jessie Buckley (Hamnet). Comedy/Musical Actor: Timothée Chalamet (Marty Supreme). Comedy/Musical Actress: Rose Byrne (If I Had Legs I'd Kick You). Supporting Actor: Stellan Skarsgård (Sentimental Value). Supporting Actress: Teyana Taylor (One Battle After Another). Top Television Winners: Best Drama Series: The Pitt (HBO Max). Best Comedy/Musical Series: The Studio (Apple TV). Best Limited Series: Adolescence (Netflix) - swept all 4 categories. Best Podcast: Good Hang with Amy Poehler. Other Notable Winners: Animated Feature: KPop Demon Hunters (Netflix). Original Score: Ludwig Göransson (Sinners). Non-English Language Film: The Secret Agent (Brazil).
